name: io.github.expremiental/yandex-metrika-mcp
title: Yandex Metrika MCP
description: Read-only MCP server for Yandex Metrika analytics. Query visits, users, traffic sources, bounce rate, geography, devices, and UTMs in plain language — directly in Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client. Hosted service (no setup needed) and self-host with your own token.
